description:
Automate your patch management

Update third-party software, deploy custom scripts, and make impactful configuration changes to your on-prem Windows devices in minutes with PDQ Deploy.
Security Enhancements
- Upgrade SQLite to 3.53.0 to address flagging of CVE-2025-70873
- Updated the MailKit email library to address a STARTTLS response injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-41319)

New Features
- Added CLI commands to update and test credentials for automated password rotation workflows (SetServiceCredentials, UpdateDeployCredential, UpdateScanCredential, TestCredential)
- Added CLI command to create custom variables
- Deploy: Added CLI command to clean unused repository files for automated maintenance workflows
- Deploy: Added CLI commands to export and import packages
- Deploy: Added CLI command to query deployment status for monitoring, automation orchestration, and reporting integrations
- Deploy: Added CLI command to delete packages
- Inventory: Added CLI commands to export and import collections
- Inventory: Added CLI command to delete computers for automated cleanup and decommissioning workflows
- Inventory: Added -Wait flag to ScanComputers and ScanCollections commands for synchronous scanning in automated verification workflows
- Inventory: Added CLI command to manually trigger auto reports for integration with external automation workflows
- Inventory: Added CLI commands for network discovery enabling scheduled and automated scanning workflows (StartNetworkDiscovery, GetNetworkDiscoveryStatus, StopNetworkDiscovery)

Bug Fixes
- Deploy: Fixed issue where package order in schedules was not preserved after first save
- Inventory: Updated Help Manual for broken Link on Variables Windows Page
